g.text: H6 Where the 758 episodes happened — 3 days, 24 hours

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #000000; stroke-width: 0.8; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square

g.text: 758 engagement episodes reconstructed from the light's own state log, distributed by start hour and date. The afternoon band (12:00–17:00) is where most episodes start. The 12 bond episodes (durations > 30 s) are concentrated in this band on the warmer days.
